input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.2.3
            TITLE: powertrain operation

            CONTENT:
            rule D.2.3: Powertrain Operation
D.2.3 Powertrain Operation 
In the paddock, (IC) Engines may be run or (EV) Tractive System may be Active if all three:   
a. The vehicle has passed Technical Inspection up to and including the Tilt Test OR a 
Technical Inspector gives permission  
b. The vehicle is supported on a stand  
c. The drive wheels are minimum 10 cm off the ground, OR the drive wheels are removed
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 126 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: D.2.3 Powertrain Operation In the paddock, (IC) Engines may be run or (EV) Tractive System may be Active if all three: a. The vehicle has passed Technical Inspection up to and including the Tilt Test OR a Technical Inspector gives permission b. The vehicle is supported on a stand c. the drive wheels are minimum 10 cm off the ground, OR the drive wheels are removed
